.file-embed.background: rgb(240, 247, 245) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.internal-embed.background: rgb(240, 247, 245) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.internal-embed.is-loaded.background: rgb(240, 247, 245) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.markdown-embed.background: rgb(240, 247, 245) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.status-bar.background: rgb(246, 251, 247) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.view-content.background: rgb(246, 251, 247) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

body.background: rgb(246, 251, 247) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

body.styled-scrollbars.background: rgb(246, 251, 247) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.is-active.is-clickable.nav-file-titl.background: rgb(240, 247, 245) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.is-selected.mod-complex.suggestion-i.background: rgb(231, 242, 238) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.mod-active.workspace-leaf.background: rgb(246, 251, 247) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.mod-complex.suggestion-item.background: rgb(231, 242, 238) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.mod-horizontal.mod-left-split.mod-si.background: rgb(246, 251, 247) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.mod-horizontal.mod-right-split.mod-s.background: rgb(246, 251, 247) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.multi-select-pill.background: rgba(221, 95, 110, 0.1) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.prompt.background: rgb(240, 247, 245) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.workspace-leaf.background: rgb(246, 251, 247) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

input[type=\"search\"].background: rgb(246, 251, 247) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

kbd.background: rgb(231, 242, 238) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

mark.background: rgb(231, 242, 238) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

pre.background: rgb(231, 242, 238) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

pre.language-js.background: rgb(231, 242, 238) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box
